2604.16004.title: AgentV-RL: Scaling Reward Modeling with Agentic Verifier
2604.16004.paper_summary: Verifiers have been demonstrated to enhance LLM reasoning via test-time scaling (TTS). Yet, they face significant challenges in complex domains. Error propagation from incorrect intermediate reasoning can lead to false positives for seemingly plausible solutions, while lacking external grounding makes verifiers unreliable on computation or knowledge-intensive tasks. To address these challenges, we propose Agentic Verifier, a framework that transforms reward modeling into a multi-turn, tool-augmented deliberative process. We introduce complementary forward and backward agents: one traces solutions from premises to conclusions, while the other re-checks conclusions against their underlying premises. This bidirectional process enables a comprehensive, reliable, and interpretable assessment of solutions. To facilitate practical deployment, we propose AgentV-RL. Through proactive exploration and reinforcement learning, the verifier autonomously interleaves tool-use with internal reasoning. Extensive experiments show that Agentic Verifier yields consistent performance gains under both parallel and sequential TTS. Notably, our 4B variant surpasses state-of-the-art ORMs by 25.2%, positioning it as a promising paradigm for agentic reward modeling.
2604.16004.paper_summary_zh: 驗證器已被證明能通過測試時擴展（TTS）增強大型語言模型（LLM）的推理能力。<lb/>然而，它們在複雜領域面臨重大挑戰。<lb/>來自不正確中間推理的錯誤傳播可能導致看似合理解決方案的假陽性，而缺乏外部基礎使得驗證器在計算或知識密集型任務上變得不可靠。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了Agentic Verifier，一個將獎勵建模轉化為多回合、工具增強的深思過程的框架。<lb/>我們引入了互補的前向和後向代理：一個從前提追溯到結論，另一個則將結論與其基礎前提進行重新檢查。<lb/>這一雙向過程使得對解決方案的評估變得全面、可靠且可解釋。<lb/>為了促進實際部署，我們提出了AgentV-RL。<lb/>通過主動探索和強化學習，驗證器自主地將工具使用與內部推理交織在一起。<lb/>大量實驗表明，Agentic Verifier在平行和序列TTS下均能持續提升性能。<lb/>值得注意的是，我們的4B變體超越了最先進的ORM，提升幅度達25.2%，使其成為一種有前景的代理獎勵建模範式。
2604.16004.author: Jiazheng Zhang et.al.
2604.16004.authors: Jiazheng Zhang, Ziche Fu, Zhiheng Xi, Wenqing Jing, Mingxu Chai, Wei He, Guoqiang Zhang, Chenghao Fan, Chenxin An, Wenxiang Chen, Zhicheng Liu, Haojie Pan, Dingwei Zhu, Tao Gui, Qi Zhang, Xuanjing Huang
